author: gb9t
content: Iter 53 result: drivers/iommu/intel-nested.md (VT-d 2-stage nested - nested.c ~241 lines; per-PASID S1+S2 nested-domain alloc + per-PASID nested-attach via pasid-entry write + cache_invalidate_user batched QI submit + iommufd-eventq fault routing) + virt/kvm/x86-svm.md (AMD SVM vendor half - svm.c ~5747 + svm.h + vmenter.S + avic.c ~1319; per-vCPU VMCB + AVIC IPI bypass + NPT TDP-MMU integration + per-VM ASID + SEV gate + Hyper-V accel hooks). 56 Tier-3s total. Next iter: drivers/iommu/intel-cache.c (IOTLB + DEV-IOTLB + PIOTLB cache mgmt API surface) + virt/kvm/x86-mmu-spte.md (per-SPTE bit layout + make_spte details, currently glossed in mmu-tdp/shadow Tier-3s).
